GRF Causal Forest Learner

Source: R/grf_family.R
Lrnr_grf_causal_forest.Rd

A direct CATE learner backed by grf::causal_forest.

Value

Learner object with methods for training and prediction.

Super class

sl3::Lrnr_base -> Lrnr_grf_causal_forest

Methods

Public methods

  • Lrnr_grf_causal_forest$new()

  • Lrnr_grf_causal_forest$clone()

Inherited methods
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$assert_trained()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$base_chain()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$base_predict()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$base_train()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$chain()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$custom_chain()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$get_outcome_range()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$get_outcome_type()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$predict()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$predict_fold()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$print()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$process_formula()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$reparameterize()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$retrain()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$sample()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$set_train()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$subset_covariates()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$train()
  • sl3::Lrnr_base$train_sublearners()

Method new()

Usage

Lrnr_grf_causal_forest$new(
  treatment_level = NULL,
  control_level = NULL,
  modifiers = NULL,
  tune = c("light", "none", "all"),
  ...
)

Method clone()

The objects of this class are cloneable with this method.

Usage

Lrnr_grf_causal_forest$clone(deep = FALSE)

Arguments

deep

Whether to make a deep clone.
